---
title: "SectorMetrics.tsx"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\SectorMetrics.tsx"
loc: 44
complexity: 8
logic_score: 8.05
style_score: 3.59
intel_score: 5.64
overall_score: 4.08
---

## Intent
The `SectorMetrics.tsx` sector implements modular logic focusing on SectorMetrics, SectorMetrics, matrix, overall, logic, style, intel, aesthetic, stability, coupling, sovereignty, anomaly, gravity, Metric. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SectorMetrics, SectorMetrics, matrix, overall, logic, style, intel, aesthetic, stability, coupling, sovereignty, anomaly, gravity, Metric. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 11 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://react)
- [Node](file://../types/index.ts)

### Exports
- `SectorMetrics`
- `SectorMetrics`
- `matrix`
- `overall`
- `logic`
- `style`
- `intel`
- `aesthetic`
- `stability`
- `coupling`
- `sovereignty`
- `anomaly`
- `gravity`
- `Metric`
